anchors.label: Great Lakes clear natural lake
anchors.notes: Primary clear-lake SMB benchmark for tube, drop-shot, topwater, jerkbait, and baitfish seasonal transitions.

anchors.label: Kentucky highland lake
anchors.notes: Wind- and stain-sensitive smallmouth lake benchmark where spinnerbait, swimbait, and jerkbait lanes need to show correctly.

anchors.label: Tennessee current river
anchors.notes: Core river benchmark for current seams, rock, spinnerbait, inline spinner, and bounded seasonal river behavior.

anchors.label: Pennsylvania clear river
anchors.notes: Clear-river benchmark for northern smallmouth seasonal tightening and baitfish-first behavior within the app's Great Lakes / Upper Midwest region map.

anchors.label: Wisconsin natural lake
anchors.notes: Clear northern natural-lake overlay for spawn, summer bluebird, and baitfish/topwater tradeoffs.

anchors.label: Minnesota northern lake
anchors.notes: Northern stained-lake overlay for fall baitfish tightening and winter discipline.

anchors.label: Colorado western river
anchors.notes: Western river overlay for postspawn soft-minnow/open-water behavior and cleaner fall-winter posture.

anchors.label: Washington inland river
anchors.notes: Northwest river overlay for early-fall and cool-season baitfish/current reads.

anchors.label: Ohio dirty reservoir
anchors.notes: Dirty-water overlay for visible smallmouth lake/reservoir behavior in prespawn, summer stain, and winter control.

anchors.label: Willamette River smallmouth
anchors.notes: Northwest clear-river overlay for spring tube, summer topwater, September NORTHWEST_EARLY_FALL suspending window, and November cool-down tightening.

anchors.label: Northern California smallmouth river
anchors.notes: NorCal clear-river overlay confirming spring tube, summer topwater, and fall jerkbait western river posture for northern_california SMB.

anchors.label: Connecticut River smallmouth
anchors.notes: Northeast clear-river overlay for the distinct northeast SMB rows: bold-topwater June override, and active-November jerkbait posture vs GLUM's winter-locked tube.

anchors.label: Illinois River dirty smallmouth
anchors.notes: GLUM dirty-river overlay: April spring where spinnerbait/ned_rig displace finesse tube via clarity penalty, July summer where ALL clear-water lures (tube, suspending, squarebill, walking, inline_spinner) are penalized and paddle_tail_swimbait wins as the only dirty-friendly option in GREAT_LAKES_CLEAR_SUMMER_RIVER, and October fall where spinnerbait displaces suspending_jerkbait.
